title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.articleTitle: The Power of Art in Society
content.text: In recent years, there has been a (17) ______ in the public's appreciation of art. (17) TRANSFORM || Art galleries have reported an increase in (18) ______ visitors, demonstrating a growing interest in cultural activities. (18) NUMBER || Moreover, the digital age has made art more (19) ______ to people who may not have had the opportunity to experience it before. (19) ACCESS || The impact of art on society is (20) ______, influencing both the individual and the community. (20) QUANTIFY || Some argue that art can improve one's (21) ______ and well-being, offering new perspectives and a sense of (21) HAPPY || connection. However, despite the generally positive view of art's role, there are (22) ______ about funding and how resources are allocated. (22) DISCUSS || Critics have also pointed out the potential for art to be (23) ______ by those in power, using it to manipulate public opinion. (23) USE || It is therefore crucial for society to remain (24) ______ of art's potential to influence both positively and negatively. (24) AWARE

example.text: Art has (0) ______ enriched our lives through history.
example.explanation: Adverb required to modify the main verb; TRADITION → TRADITIONALLY.

questions.explanation: Noun required; verb to noun suffix -ation applied to TRANSFORM.
Adjective required; noun to adjective transformation adding -ous.
Adjective required; adding suffix -ible to form adjective.
Adjective required; negative prefix un- and suffix -able to indicate something cannot be measured.
Noun required; adjective to noun transformation adding suffix -ness.
Noun required; verb to noun transformation adding suffix -ions.
Verb required; adding negative prefix mis- to form a verb indicating incorrect usage.
Noun required; adjective to noun transformation adding suffix -ness.
